scripts.dev: pnpm check:runtime && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm --filter web dev" "pnpm --filter api dev"
scripts.lint: pnpm check:runtime && pnpm --filter web lint && pnpm --filter api lint
scripts.test: pnpm check:runtime && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter api test
scripts.build: pnpm check:runtime && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter api build
scripts.prisma:generate: pnpm check:runtime && pnpm --filter api exec prisma generate
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm check:runtime && pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: pnpm check:runtime && pnpm --filter api exec prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: pnpm check:runtime && pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate reset --force
